title: 31st Annual Rally
description: Free camping Fri/Sat nights. Saturday led ride through the Santa Cruz Mountains, BBQ back at the campsite to follow. Then, stupid human games. Guaranteed no injuries or your money back.

title: The Dark Ride
description: Our annual evening roll through the Santa Cruz mountains—favorite roads, fewer cars, more critters. Meet at 19:00, KSU 19:30 or whenever, pizza at Woodstock’s after.
